name: Patient
history: Health condition requiring time off work for physical therapy. Past interactions with HR and a supervisor related to return-to-work and disability status.
intermediate_belief: I need to hold onto things to be successful.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle my feelings on my own.
coping_strategies: Holding onto items and memories as a way to feel prepared and competent.
situation: Running into a coworker outside the workplace while on medical leave.
auto_thought: I should be able to do more and be more organized.
behavior: Avoiding tasks due to fear of inadequacy and holding onto items unnecessarily.
